sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَ الْمَلْعَبُ عَنْ مُبَارَاةٍ لِكُرَةِ السَّلَّةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sportski centar je objavio utakmicu košarke u petak.
sentences.translationEn: The sports center announced a basketball match on Friday.

sentences.translation: Dva tima iz različitih kvartova su se takmičila.
sentences.translationEn: Two teams from different neighborhoods competed.

sentences.translation: Utakmica je bila uzbudljiva i završila je neriješenim rezultatom.
sentences.translationEn: The match was exciting and ended in a draw.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ الْجَمِيعُ إِعَادَةَ الْمُبَارَاةِ الأُسْبُوعَ الْقَادِمَ.
sentences.translation: Svi su odlučili ponoviti utakmicu sljedeće sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone decided to replay the match next week.
